---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Spinbot
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Use Case

Why would this be useful? How would it help your stream?

## Examples

Any examples from other tools or mockups of how this could work. (Optional)

## Additional Context

Anything else — screenshots, links, related features, etc. (Optional)
